# Lesson 3 — 12 V LED strip (MOSFET)

**Edit only:** `my_program.py`  
**Do not edit:** `helper.py`, `run.py`

The Pi does **not** power 12 V directly — a **MOSFET** switches the strip; the **12 V adapter** supplies power. Brightness uses **PWM** (fast on/off that looks like dimming).

## Run

```bash
cd ~/lessons
./run 3
```

## Reset (Git)

```bash
cd ~/lessons
./reset 3
```
